payload.answer: Extracted durable architecture commitments (Brain DB source of truth; Cognee rebuildable semantic projection; Slack strict intake agent) and preserved two open questions (Telegram addition and cheapest saturating model).
payload.decision: No final decisions recorded; only architectural commitments and open questions were stated.

entity_resolution.reason: Entities are already explicit in the summary (Brain DB, Cognee, Slack, Telegram). No additional resolution identifiers were provided.

payload.intent: Extract durable memory cards from a chat summary about Brain system architecture and open product/model questions.

relationships.object: semantic projections and memory intake workflows
relationships.subject: Brain DB

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth, with other systems acting as projections or intake layers.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection derived from Brain DB.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Open question: Should Telegram be added later as an additional memory intake channel?
Open question: Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?

details: Captured explicit principles as high-confidence durable memory cards.
Stored open questions as medium-confidence non-decisions to preserve ambiguity.
